problem: Healthcare ecosystem lacks interoperability for prescription data, leading to fragmented care, medication errors, inefficient prior authorizations, and poor visibility into patient medication histories and benefits.
solution: Nationwide health intelligence network connecting 2.32 million healthcare professionals. Provides intelligent prescribing, automated prior authorization, benefit and price intelligence, and value-based care insights. Processes 30.5 billion network transactions annually with comprehensive drug interaction checking and medication history access.
